/usr/bin/c++   -m64 -pipe -fsigned-char -fsized-deallocation -fno-common -Qunused-arguments -pthread -stdlib=libc++ -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/lib CMakeFiles/reco.dir/src/reco_main.cpp.o -o /Users/simone/Work/INFN/elettronica/MPD_dev/devel/MPD_analysis/bin/reco   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libCore.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libImt.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libRIO.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libNet.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libHist.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libGraf.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libGraf3d.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libGpad.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libROOTDataFrame.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libTree.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libTreePlayer.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libRint.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libPostscript.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libMatrix.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libPhysics.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libMathCore.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libThread.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libMultiProc.so /opt/homebrew/Cellar/root/6.38.00/lib/root/libROOTVecOps.so
